creator: tmseck@web.de
text:
On second thought (why does this always occur after one hits send?):

Did you change Squid's log directory to /var/log/squid, too? Then you
could reasonable assume that squid_chdir would be the right variable to
tweak.

Do you think that adding a squid_logdir rc variable would be more
intuitive? I would then derive the defaults for squid_chdir and
squid_pid from the value of squid_logdir. Maybe squid_chdir could be
made "read only" then to avoid further confusion?
